Introducing the Explyra ERP Suite
4.9 / 5 (1,482+ reviews)

One platform.
Everything
your team needs.

Explyra is not just an app ΓÇö it's a complete digital suite. Expense intelligence, health tracking, AI-powered learning, developer tools, and seamless P2P collaboration. All under one roof, built by one visionary.

The Explyra ERP Suite

Ten products. One vision.

Every tool your company and team needs ΓÇö built with the same standard of intelligence, design, and reliability.

≡ƒôê
CRM
Explyra CRM

Enterprise-grade customer relationship management with high-performance sales pipelines, analytics, and intelligent lead tracking.

Launch App ΓåÆ
≡ƒÆ╝
Expense
Explyra Expense

End-to-end expense management with AI automation, multi-level approvals, and real-time reimbursement tracking for growing companies.

Explore ΓåÆ
≡ƒÅâ
Health
Explyra Health

Your personal AI health companion. Track workouts, sleep, nutrition, and mental wellness ΓÇö with live weather-aware AI recommendations.

Launch App ΓåÆ

Explyra Learning

Expert-curated courses on Agentic AI, Prompt Engineering, and SEO ΓÇö built for the next generation of digital professionals.

Launch App ΓåÆ

Developers
Explyra Developers

A power toolkit for developers ΓÇö code minifier, hash generator, strong password generator, online IDE, link shortener, and more.

Explore ΓåÆ

Booking
Explyra Booking

Your professional scheduling page. Set availability, share your link, and let customers book meetings with you automatically.

Launch App ΓåÆ
Γ£à
Attendance
Explyra Attendance

Modern attendance tracking for schools and companies. Geofenced check-ins, real-time logs, and intelligent reporting.

Launch App ΓåÆ
≡ƒÅ¡
ERP
Explyra Manufacturing

Professional ERP system for production planning, real-time inventory management, and machine tracking across the factory floor.

Launch App ΓåÆ

Billing
Explyra Invoicing

Professional invoicing and billing software for small businesses. Create, send, and track invoices with automatic reminders.

Launch App ΓåÆ

Explyra MailBox

Powerful professional email for your domain, featuring an intuitive interface, fast search, and spam protection.

≡ƒÆ╝ Explyra Expense

Control every rupee. Effortlessly.

Enterprise-grade expense management for modern companies. From submission to reimbursement, Explyra Expense eliminates manual work and gives finance teams the clarity they need.

Γ£ô
Multi-level approval workflows with instant notifications
Γ£ô
Real-time reimbursement tracking: Submitted ΓåÆ Approved ΓåÆ Paid
Γ£ô
Google Drive + ImgBB for receipts and large attachments
Γ£ô
Kimi AI: auto-categorization, anomaly detection, spend insights
Γ£ô
Web + Android + iOS ΓÇö submit from anywhere

≡ƒÅâ Explyra Health

Your AI health companion, always on.

Track every dimension of your health ΓÇö physical, mental, and nutritional. Explyra Health uses real-time weather data and AI to give you personalized, context-aware recommendations every single day.

Γ£ô
Workout tracking with AI-generated personalized plans
Γ£ô
Mental health journaling, mood tracking, stress scores
Γ£ô
Sleep quality analysis and bedtime recommendations
Γ£ô
Calorie tracking with AI-curated diet plans
Γ£ô
Live weather integration ΓÇö smart suggestions based on conditions
Γ£ô
Meditation timer, breathing exercises, mindfulness streaks
Launch App ΓåÆ
≡ƒôÜ Explyra Learning

Master the skills that define tomorrow.

Explyra Learning offers expert-crafted courses on the most in-demand digital skills ΓÇö Agentic AI development, prompt engineering, and SEO mastery. AI-powered learning paths adapt to your pace and goals.

Γ£ô
Agentic AI Development ΓÇö build autonomous AI agents from scratch
Γ£ô
Prompt Engineering Mastery ΓÇö get expert-level outputs every time
Γ£ô
SEO Expertise ΓÇö rank anything, anywhere, on any platform
Γ£ô
AI-powered progress tracking and adaptive learning paths
Γ£ô
Community challenges, certificates, and real project work

ΓÜí Explyra Developers

Every tool a developer actually needs.

Stop juggling 10 different websites. Explyra Developers brings every essential developer utility into one fast, clean, ad-free platform ΓÇö built by a developer, for developers.

Γ£ô
Code Minifier ΓÇö JS, CSS, HTML with one click
Γ£ô
Hash Generator ΓÇö MD5, SHA-256, bcrypt, and more
Γ£ô
Strong Password Generator ΓÇö truly secure, custom rules
Γ£ô
Online IDE ΓÇö write, run, and share code in-browser
Γ£ô
Link Shortener with custom slugs and analytics
Γ£ô
More tools shipping continuously ΓÇö zero ads, always free

We've got your back, always.

Dedicated support for every product in the Explyra Suite. Get help when you need it ΓÇö however you need it.

≡ƒôû
Documentation

Comprehensive guides, API references, and tutorials for every Explyra product. Search, browse, and get answers instantly.

Live Chat Support

Connect with our support team in real time. Available for critical issues, onboarding help, and product questions.

Ticketing System

Submit a support ticket for non-urgent requests. Track status, get updates, and resolve issues with full transparency.

AI Support Bot

24/7 intelligent assistant that can answer product questions, walk you through setup, and escalate to humans when needed.

Onboarding Sessions

Community Forum

Mitanshu Bhasin
Founder & Lead Developer ┬╖ Explyra

One developer. One vision. An entire digital suite built from scratch ΓÇö Firebase backend, cross-platform mobile apps, AI integrations, developer tooling, and P2P infrastructure. Explyra is not just a product, it's a statement: the right combination of AI, design, and engineering can give teams everything they need in a single platform.
